name: langfuse-observability
description: The Langfuse x Claude Code Observability Plugin

hooks.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --quiet --script "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; else exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; fi
if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --quiet --script "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; else exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/langfuse_hook.py; fi
